message:
feat(command,store): add PEXPIRE, EXPIREAT, PEXPIREAT, EXPIRETIME, PEXPIRETIME commands

Implement the remaining Redis TTL family commands via a unified
expire_like() dispatch to reduce code duplication.

- Add ExpireCommandKind enum (RelativeSeconds/RelativeMilliseconds/
  AbsoluteSeconds/AbsoluteMilliseconds) to unify expire logic
- Extract expire_like() generic handler from the old EXPIRE implementation
  supporting all four command variants with NX/XX/GT/LT options
- Add EXPIRETIME and PEXPIRETIME query commands returning absolute
  Unix timestamps (seconds and milliseconds respectively)
- Wire all new commands into dispatch_argv() routing
- Add conformance fixtures for error cases and string operations
- Add supporting store methods for absolute-timestamp TTL queries

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
